glosses.ro: a consimți; a fi de acord
glosses.ja: 同意する; 承諾する

sentences.target: Je consens à partager ma position.

translations.fr: Je consens à partager ma position.
translations.en: I agree to share my location.
translations.de: Ich stimme zu, meinen Standort zu teilen.
translations.it: Accetto di condividere la mia posizione.
translations.he: אני מסכים לשתף את המיקום שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đồng ý chia sẻ vị trí của mình.
translations.nl: Ik ga akkoord met het delen van mijn locatie.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी लोकेशन साझा करने के लिए सहमत हूँ.
translations.el: Συμφωνώ να κοινοποιήσω την τοποθεσία μου.
translations.nb: Jeg samtykker i å dele posisjonen min.
translations.id: Saya setuju untuk membagikan lokasi saya.
translations.sv: Jag samtycker till att dela min plats.
translations.ro: Sunt de acord să îmi partajez locația.
translations.da: Jeg samtykker i at dele min placering.
translations.ja: 位置情報の共有に同意します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb 'consens'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular of 'consentir'; main predicate.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement governed by 'à' after 'consens'.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'position'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'partager'.

sentences.target: Tu consens à l'échange des données.

translations.fr: Tu consens à l'échange des données.
translations.de: Du stimmst zu, Daten zu teilen.
translations.vi: Bạn đồng ý chia sẻ dữ liệu.
translations.nl: Je gaat akkoord met het delen van gegevens.
translations.hi: तुम डेटा साझा करने के लिए सहमत हो.
translations.nb: Du samtykker til å dele data.
translations.sv: Du samtycker till att dela data.
translations.ro: Ești de acord să partajezi datele.
translations.da: Du samtykker i at dele data.
translations.ja: あなたはデータの共有に同意します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'consens'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'consentir'; main predicate.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement.
Elided definite article before a vowel (le → l'); determiner for 'échange'.
Common noun; head of the NP 'l'échange des données', complement of 'à'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'les'; introduces a definite genitival complement ('des données') to 'échange'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of 'échange' via 'des'.

sentences.target: Nous consentons à payer les frais.

translations.fr: Nous consentons à payer les frais.
translations.en: We agree to pay the fees.
translations.de: Wir stimmen zu, die Gebühren zu zahlen.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đồng ý trả các khoản phí.
translations.nl: Wij gaan akkoord met het betalen van de kosten.
translations.hi: हम शुल्क का भुगतान करने के लिए सहमत हैं.
translations.nb: Vi samtykker i å betale gebyrene.
translations.sv: Vi samtycker till att betala avgifterna.
translations.ro: Suntem de acord să plătim taxele.
translations.da: Vi samtykker i at betale gebyrerne.
translations.ja: 私たちは料金を支払うことに同意します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'consentons'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural of 'consentir'; main predicate.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement governed by 'à' after 'consentons'.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'frais'.
Common noun, masculine plural (invariable form); direct object of 'payer'.

sentences.target: J'hésite à consentir à ce contrat.

translations.fr: J'hésite à consentir à ce contrat.
translations.en: I hesitate to consent to this contract.
translations.es: Dudo en dar mi consentimiento a este contrato.
translations.it: Esito a dare il consenso a questo contratto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我犹豫是否同意这份合同。
translations.yue: 我猶豫是否同意呢份合約。
translations.ru: Я колеблюсь давать согласие на этот договор.
translations.pt: Eu hesito em consentir neste contrato.
translations.he: אני מהסס לתת את הסכמתי לחוזה הזה.
translations.tr: Bu sözleşmeye onay vermekte tereddüt ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi do dự khi đồng ý với hợp đồng này.
translations.ar: أتردد في الموافقة على هذا العقد.
translations.nl: Ik aarzel om in te stemmen met dit contract.
translations.uk: Я вагаюся давати згоду на цей договір.
translations.hi: मैं इस अनुबंध के लिए सहमति देने में हिचकिचा रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Waham się, czy wyrazić zgodę na tę umowę.
translations.el: Διστάζω να δώσω τη συγκατάθεσή μου σε αυτό το συμβόλαιο.
translations.nb: Jeg nøler med å samtykke til denne kontrakten.
translations.id: Saya ragu untuk menyetujui kontrak ini.
translations.sv: Jag tvekar att samtycka till detta kontrakt.
translations.ro: Ezit să îmi dau consimțământul pentru acest contract.
translations.cs: Váhám dát souhlas s toutou smlouvou.
translations.da: Jeg tøver med at samtykke til denne kontrakt.
translations.ja: この契約に同意することをためらっています。

tokens.explanation: Elided subject pronoun before vowel sound (je → j'); subject of 'hésite'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular of 'hésiter'; main predicate.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement 'consentir'.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of 'hésite'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'contrat'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à'.
